news.headline: Amazon makes last-minute bid for TikTok, boosting stock; details not disclosed. - Investor's Business Daily
news.summary: Shares of Amazon are on the rise following a recent offer to acquire the widely-used short-video platform TikTok. The bid, made at the eleventh hour, has sparked positive momentum for Amazon stock. The details were disclosed in a report from The New York Times. The move indicates Amazon's interest in joining the competition to secure TikTok, which has become a highly sought-after app. This development was featured in an article by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Roblox's stock increases on new advertising initiative, earning praise from Wall Street analysts.
news.summary: Roblox, a popular gaming and social platform for young users, has gained praise from Wall Street analysts for its recent online advertising campaign. Following this initiative, Roblox saw a rise in its stock on Wednesday. This positive reception reflects the company's efforts to expand its revenue streams and engage with its young audience. Investors and analysts are optimistic about Roblox's potential for growth in the online advertising sector.

news.headline: Trump to announce reciprocal tariffs; S&P 500 rises on "Liberation Day"; Senate voting on Canada trade.
news.summary: Later on Wednesday, President Trump is set to announce reciprocal tariffs, although details of the "Liberation Day" tariffs remain unknown. The S&P 500 saw a turnaround and rose. The Senate is scheduled to vote on trade with Canada.

news.headline: DigitalBridge (NYSE: DBRG) will release Q1 2025 financial results on May 1, 2025, with a conference call at 8:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: DigitalBridge Group, Inc. (NYSE: DBRG) revealed that they are set to unveil their financial performance for the First Quarter of 2025 prior to the market launch on May 1, 2025. The company plans to host an earnings presentation and conference call at 8:00 a.m. ET on the same day. This event will be live-streamed online, with a webcast link available on the Shareholders section of their website at ir.digitalbridge.com/even.

news.headline: Trump claims his tariffs will fix unfair trade practices, citing decades of countries taking advantage of US - but is he right?
news.summary: President Trump claims that nations have been taking advantage of the United States for many years. While there is validity to this assertion, there is also a significant level of inconsistency in his stance.

news.headline: Ensurge Micropower resolves all critical issues, solid-state microbatteries ready for shipment to partners.
news.summary: In Oslo, Norway, on 2 April 2025, Ensurge Micropower (OSE: ENSU, OTCQB: ENMPY) shared that it successfully addressed all outstanding concerns concerning its solid-state microbatteries. This progress indicates that the batteries are now prepared for delivery to key partners.

news.headline: Europe Construction Industry Report 2025 covers 10 countries, 40+ segments across residential, commercial, industrial, institutional, infrastructure construction.
news.summary: A recent report added to ResearchAndMarkets.com offers detailed insights into the construction industry in Europe with a focus on market size and forecasts by value and volume. The report covers over 40 market segments including residential, commercial, industrial, institutional, and infrastructure construction. It also delves into city-level construction data by value and construction cost structure. The Q1 2025 update highlights key trends and projections for the sector. This comprehensive analysis provides valuable information for stakeholders in the European construction industry.

news.headline: Finland construction industry to grow 4.3% to €20.27 billion in 2025: ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: A recent report on the construction industry in Finland has been released by a leading market research firm. The report covers over 40 market segments including residential, commercial, industrial, institutional, and infrastructure construction. It provides insights on the market size and forecast by both value and volume, with a focus on city-level construction and construction cost structure. The findings suggest that the construction market in Finland is projected to experience a 4.3% annual growth, reaching a total value of EUR 20.27 billion in the first quarter of 2025.

news.headline: Tanzania's construction industry is projected to grow by 7% to $11 billion in 2025, reaching TZS 29.26 trillion.
news.summary: A recent report on the Tanzania Construction Industry reveals that the market is projected to experience a 7.0% annual growth rate, reaching a value of TZS 29.26 trillion by 2025. The report covers over 40 market segments including residential, commercial, industrial, institutional, and infrastructure construction. It also provides insights on city-level construction values and cost structures. This data update was released in Q1 of 2025 and is now available through ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.headline: Applovin is bidder for TikTok - CNBC's Faber.
Supreme Court rules against makers of teen-friendly flavored vapes, backing FDA's rejection of applications for e-liquid.
news.summary: In a recent decision, the justices ruled in favor of the Food and Drug Administration by rejecting applications from manufacturers of flavored liquids for e-cigarettes. This ruling marks a significant victory for the FDA in its effort to regulate the e-cigarette industry. The exact number of applications rejected was not specified, but this decision is expected to impact a substantial number of companies producing these flavored e-liquids.

news.headline: Energys Group closes $10.125 million IPO, offering 2,250,000 ordinary shares at $4.50 each. Traded on Nasdaq as "ENGS."
news.summary: Energys Group Limited (NASDAQ: ENGS), based in Billingshurst, West Sussex, United Kingdom, has successfully completed its initial public offering on April 2, 2025. The Offering involved 2,250,000 ordinary shares priced at US$4.50 per share, resulting in total gross proceeds of US$10,125,000 before underwriting discounts and other expenses were deducted. The public trading of the Ordinary Shares commenced on The Nasdaq Capital Market with the ticker symbol "ENGS" on April 1, 2025. Energys Group is known for providing energy efficiency and decarbonization solutions for the built environment.

news.headline: Amazon plans to launch its initial Kuiper internet satellites this month, marking a significant step in the company's space ambitions.
Trump told cabinet that Musk will leave administration in the coming months - CNBC.
Digital Domain to present at AI & Technology Virtual Investor Conf on April 3, 2025. Inviting investors, advisors, analysts to attend online.
news.summary: The corporation is welcoming individual and institutional investors, as well as advisors and analysts, to participate in an online event at VirtualInvestorConferences.com. They are eager to engage with a wide audience in this virtual setting.

news.headline: Columbus hosts 2025 Komen Race for the Cure on May 17 to fund life-saving research & patient care. Woman dies from breast cancer every 12 mins in the US.
news.summary: In Columbus, Ohio, Susan G. Komen®, the top breast cancer organization globally, revealed plans to conduct a Race for the Cure this upcoming spring. The 2025 Komen Columbus Race for the Cure is scheduled for Saturday, May 17, 2025, aiming to bring together survivors, families, and advocates to raise funds for research, offer patient support, and create significant impact for those affected by breast cancer. Shockingly, every 12 minutes, a woman in the U.S. loses her life to breast cancer.

news.headline: Sonic launches 263-piece TSA-approved aviation toolset in rugged case for fly-away technicians.
news.summary: Sonic, a renowned professional tool and equipment provider, has introduced an innovative solution for fly-away technicians. This includes an all-in-one portable hard-shell case that houses an impressive 263 tools. Designed specifically for aviation professionals, this ruggedized case ensures easy access to all necessary tools in one place. The announcement was made on April 2, 2025, in Auburn, Alabama.

news.headline: CHC: Creating Healthier Communities partners with 100+ organizations in Modern Medicaid Alliance to protect Medicaid.
news.summary: Washington, D.C., April 2, 2025 - CHC: Creating Healthier Communities has recently teamed up with over 100 organizations as part of the Modern Medicaid Alliance, aiming to safeguard Medicaid amidst current challenges. This partnership solidifies a collective front in supporting Medicaid and its beneficiaries, emphasizing the critical need to address potential threats and sustain vital healthcare services.

news.headline: Melting Pot commemorates 50 years with launch of Grand Reserve Cheese Fondue, exclusive for its golden anniversary.
news.summary: In celebration of its 50th anniversary, a popular fondue restaurant launched its unique Grand Reserve Cheese Fondue. The renowned brand, known for creating memorable dining experiences, introduced this exclusive item to commemorate its milestone. The limited-time Grand Reserve Cheese Fondue is a special addition to the menu in honor of the occasion. Hailing from Tampa, Florida, the restaurant is marking half a century of success by offering this special dish to its customers.

news.headline: Redesign Group wins 2025 North America Emerging Partner award from Rapid7 for exceptional growth and collaboration.
news.summary: A technology and cybersecurity firm based in El Segundo, California known as The Redesign Group ("Redesign") has proudly disclosed their recognition as the 2025 North America Emerging Partner of the Year by Rapid7, a notable figure in extended risk and threat detection. This distinguished award highlights Redesign's remarkable progress over the past year, attributing their success to continuous teamwork in providing cutting-edge security solutions and assistance. This recognition comes amidst a dynamic threat landscape, where businesses are increasingly relying on seasoned partners for support.

news.headline: Italy's construction industry is projected to grow by 2.6% in 2025, reaching €111.64 billion, with forecasts up to 2029.
news.summary: A recent report on the construction industry in Italy reveals that the market is projected to experience a 2.6% annual growth, reaching a value of EUR 111.64 billion by 2025. The report provides insights into over 40 market segments including residential, commercial, industrial, institutional, and infrastructure construction. Additionally, it offers data on city-level construction values and construction cost structures. This report has been made available on ResearchAndMarkets.com for interested parties.

news.headline: Argentina's construction industry projected to grow by 8.8% to ARS 7.75 trillion in 2025 per ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: A recent report added to ResearchAndMarkets.com offers insights into the Argentina construction industry. The report provides market size and forecast data by value and volume for over 40 market segments, including residential, commercial, industrial, institutional, and infrastructure construction. The report also includes data on city-level construction values and construction cost structures. In the first quarter of 2025, the construction market in Argentina is projected to grow by 8.8% annually, reaching a total of ARS 7.75 trillion.

news.headline: FDUSD stablecoin depegs after Justin Sun claims insolvency. First Digital refutes, assures full solvency. Legal action planned. More updates soon.
news.summary: The FDUSD, the first digital stablecoin pegged to the US dollar, experienced a depegging on April 2nd after allegations of insolvency made by Justin Sun, the founder of the Tron network. Sun claimed that the issuer of the tokenized fiat, First Digital, is insolvent. Responding to these claims, First Digital reassured users about the solvency of the issuer, stating that every dollar backing FDUSD is secure and backed by US Treasury Bills, with ISIN numbers of reserves detailed in their attestation report. They attributed the dispute to TrueUSD (TUSD), another stablecoin. On April 2, in a post, First Digital declared their intention to pursue legal action against Sun for his social media remarks. This situation resulted in FDUSD losing its dollar peg. The news was sourced from CoinMarketCap. Stay tuned for further updates on this evolving story.

news.headline: Medivis receives FDA 510(k) clearance for Spine Navigation, launches in the US; significant advancement for surgical intelligence.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, Medivis Inc. disclosed that their innovative technology in surgical intelligence, the Spine Navigation platform, has obtained 510(k) clearance from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA). This news signifies a major step forward in the company's progress in revolutionizing surgery.

news.headline: EssilorLuxottica employees invest record amount in shareholding plans, showing confidence in Group's strategy.
news.summary: Employee shareholding plans at EssilorLuxottica have seen a significant increase in investment, reaching a record amount. This surge in employee participation highlights the strong confidence in the group's strategic direction. The investment from employees underscores the belief in the company's future prospects and success.

news.headline: FDUSD stablecoin depegs amid insolvency claims by Justin Sun. First Digital asserts solvency, plans legal action. Full details soon.
news.summary: The FDUSD, the first digital US dollar pegged stablecoin, experienced a depegging on April 2 after Justin Sun, the founder of the Tron network, alleged that the issuer, First Digital, is insolvent. Sun claimed that the tokenized fiat equivalent is not backed by sufficient funds. First Digital, however, refuted these claims and reassured users about its solvency by stating that every dollar backing FDUSD is secure and accounted for with US-backed T-Bills, with the reserves' ISIN numbers provided in an attestation report. The firm also clarified that the dispute was not with FDUSD, but with TrueUSD (TUSD), another stablecoin. First Digital announced its intention to pursue legal action against Sun for spreading misinformation on social media. As a result of the controversy, FDUSD lost its dollar peg. This unfolding situation will be updated with additional details as they unfold.

news.headline: ArcBest (Nasdaq: ARCB) to announce Q1 2025 results on April 29, 2025, with conference call at 9:30 am EDT, accessible at (800) 715-9871.
news.summary: ArkBest® (Nasdaq: ARCB) is scheduled to release its first quarter financial results for 2025 before the market opens on Tuesday, April 29, 2025. The company will host a conference call with executives at 9:30 a.m. EDT (8:30 a.m. CDT) on the same day to discuss the results. Interested individuals can join the call by dialing (800) 715-9871 with the conference ID 6423434. A recorded playback of the call will be accessible until the end of the day on May 13, 2025.

news.headline: 41 counterparties take $233.488 bln at Fed Reverse Repo Operation.
Inventor from Australia develops safety lock for construction props to prevent tampering and theft.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on April 2, 2025, an inventor from Mudgee, NSW, Australia, who has a background in the mining industry, discussed the creation of a safety locking product aimed at maintaining prop height and preventing theft and tampering. The inventor aimed to address industry needs by leveraging their expertise in mining.

news.headline: Greystar purchases 458 units in Spain for flexible living. €56.1 million loan secured. Development to finish by 2027.
news.summary: In London, Greystar, a renowned company in real estate investment, development, and management, has revealed the procurement of a development site in Madrid, Spain for its flexible living platform. The site is intended for constructing 458 apartments and has been acquired from Bermejo & Williamson Real Estate ("BWRE"). The necessary permits from the municipality have been obtained, and a construction loan amounting to €56.1 million has been secured from Eldridge Real Estate Credit. The development is scheduled for completion by 2027.

news.headline: Economist predicts Fed to make only one interest-rate cut by 2025 - bloomberg.
Plantro Ltd. offers to acquire up to 15% of ISC shares in a tender offer, confirmed by ISC's Board.
news.summary: In Regina, Saskatchewan on April 2, 2025, Information Services Corporation (TSX:ISC) announced that its Board of Directors is informed about Plantro Ltd.'s tender offer to acquire a maximum of 15% of Class A Limited Voting Shares of ISC.

news.headline: Article discusses impact of proposed climate reporting mandates in California on suppliers. Senate Bill 755 aims to expand disclosure requirements.
news.summary: A recent study conducted in New York revealed groundbreaking industry research that focuses on assessing the preparedness of California suppliers to comply with the state's latest climate reporting regulations. The state is intending to enhance corporate transparency regarding climate impact through the introduction of Senate Bill 755 (SB 755). This legislation aims to hold companies accountable for their environmental footprint and requires them to disclose relevant information. This initiative signifies a significant step towards promoting sustainability and encouraging businesses to prioritize environmentally-friendly practices. The research findings provide valuable insights into how well-prepared California suppliers are to meet these new regulatory standards, emphasizing the importance of corporate environmental responsibility.

news.headline: Opie AI™ from Office Practicum and Insight Health simplifies pediatric document workflow, enhancing efficiency and patient care.
news.summary: Opie AI™, a cutting-edge AI solution co-developed by Office Practicum and Insight Health, was unveiled to revolutionize pediatric documentation. This innovative tool guarantees enhanced efficiency and patient care in the pediatric industry. The announcement was made in Fort Washington, Pennsylvania on April 2, 2025. Office Practicum, renowned for its pediatric EHR solutions, is spearheading this advancement in healthcare technology.

news.headline: RH (NYSE:RH) to report Q4 earnings, expected at $1.92/share with revenue of $829.56M. Shares closed at $239.06, up 2%.
news.summary: Furniture retailer RH is set to announce its fourth-quarter financial results on Wednesday, April 2. Analysts are predicting earnings of $1.92 per share, a significant increase from 72 cents per share in the same period last year. RH is expected to report quarterly revenue of $829.56 million, surpassing the previous year's $738.26 million. In the third quarter, the company fell short of revenue expectations, reporting $811.73 million against an estimated $812.16 million. RH shares closed at $239.06, marking a 2% increase. For more details and analyst ratings, visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga's website.

news.headline: $605M European Whey Protein Ingredients market to reach $604.9M by 2033, CAGR of 5.10% from 2025-2033. Growing demand due to fitness-focused diets and health benefits.
news.summary: A report on the Europe Whey Protein Ingredients market has been released, indicating significant growth prospects. The market is projected to expand from US$387.08 million in 2024 to US$604.9 million by 2033, representing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5.10% during the period from 2025 to 2033. Factors attributing to this growth include increasing consumer awareness regarding the health benefits of protein, the demand for convenient protein products, the surge in fitness-oriented diets, and an overall positive trend towards health and wellness.

news.headline: Riva International Inc. appoints Stéphane Zanoni as CEO, co-founder Aldo Zanoni becomes Executive Chairman to aid growth.
news.summary: In a move to drive strategic growth, Riva International Inc., a prominent player in revenue intelligence and CRM data automation based in Edmonton, AB, announced on April 2, 2025, that the Co-Founder and Former CEO Aldo Zanoni will now take on the role of Executive Chairman. This shift comes as part of the company's efforts to bolster its development prospects. Stéphane Zanoni has been appointed as the successor to lead the company into its next phase. This transition marks a significant change for the organization as it aims to capitalize on new opportunities.

news.headline: Esri publishes 3rd edition of A to Z GIS dictionary with over 200 new entries, essential for GIS professionals.
news.summary: Esri, a prominent player in location intelligence based in Redlands, California, has recently released the third edition of its comprehensive guide, A to Z GIS: An Illustrated Dictionary of Geographic Information Systems. This edition aims to align with the advancements and increased popularity of GIS technology, reflecting the evolving terminology of this impactful tool. With valuable contributions from over 200 experts, the updated dictionary caters to a broad audience including managers, programmers, users, writers, editors, and students. It serves as a vital resource in understanding GIS concepts, now more pertinent than ever with updated insights and terminology.

news.headline: Avangrid's Powell Creek solar project in Putnam County, Ohio exporting energy to local grid, supporting growth with jobs and investment.
news.summary: Avangrid, Inc., part of the Iberdrola Group, a prominent energy company, has initiated the export of energy from its Powell Creek solar project in Putnam County, Ohio. This marks a significant contribution to the local electric grid, catering to the increasing energy needs in Ohio and the surrounding areas. The project is currently undergoing commissioning activities, with plans for full commercial operation expected before the end of the year. The Powell Creek solar project is an essential endeavor by Avangrid to bolster renewable energy generation and support the region's growing demand for electricity.

news.headline: Top-10 firms silent in legal battle against executive order with Perkins Coie. No support shown, despite being richest.
news.summary: None of the top 10 highest revenue-generating firms in the nation have shown support for a law firm resisting an executive order, as revealed in a legal brief.

news.headline: BTC leads crypto market with price above $87,000 despite US tariffs. Experts predict potential rally to $110,000 soon. ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, ADA, TON, LINK, LEO prices analyzed for possible trends. Ahead, expect volatility, be prepared for price shifts. No investment advice provided.
news.summary: Bitcoin has surged past $87,000 as analysts predict potential for a further rally to $110,000. Fidelity's Zack Wainwright forecasts an acceleration phase, with history suggesting a sharp rally. BitMEX’s Arthur Hayes believes Bitcoin could hit $250,000 by year-end if the Federal Reserve turns to quantitative easing. Ether faces resistance at $1,965, with support at $1,754; XRP may drop to $1.27. BNB, SOL, DOGE, ADA, TON, LINK, and LEO each face key support and resistance levels, with potential for rallies based on technical analysis. This article does not offer investment advice.

news.headline: 2025 AGM minutes released, key decisions outlined, duration: 45 minutes.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, the lowest in five years. This decrease represents a significant improvement compared to last year when the rate was 6.8%. Additionally, the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the past month alone. The labor force participation rate also increased to 62.3%, showing more people are actively seeking employment. The manufacturing sector saw the most growth with 50,000 new jobs created. This positive trend is attributed to various government initiatives aimed at boosting job creation and economic growth. Experts are optimistic about the future outlook of the job market based on these latest figures.

news.headline: Supermajority's Taylor Salditch praises women's victory in Wisconsin Supreme Court election, emphasizing women's empowerment.
news.summary: In Madison, Wisconsin on April 2, 2025, Taylor Salditch, the executive director of Supermajority, a nonprofit dedicated to enhancing women's influence in politics, released a statement regarding Susan Crawford's victory in the Wisconsin Supreme Court election.

news.headline: Alegria™ unveils its latest spring 2025 collection of women's sandals with updated designs and colors, focusing on comfort and support.
news.summary: Alegria™, a prominent California women's comfort footwear brand, based in Ontario, announces the launch of its spring 2025 collection. The collection includes newly designed supportive sandals for women and updated colors in existing popular styles. Many of these styles have gained acceptance from the American Podiatric Medical Association (APMA). The brand remains committed to ensuring women's happiness and foot comfort, blending modern style with the trusted support and comfort that Alegria is known for.

news.headline: Kvika banki hf. approved to reduce share capital by ISK 91,073,340 to ISK 4,631,000,000 at AGM on March 26, 2025.
news.summary: During the Annual General Meeting of Kvika on March 26, 2025, it was agreed to decrease the company's share capital by ISK 91,073,340, equivalent to 91,073,340 shares. This reduction brought the company's share capital down from ISK 4,722,073,340 to ISK 4,631,000,000 by canceling the company's own shares in that amount.

news.headline: Fidelity offers fee-free Crypto IRA for US investors, access to Bitcoin, Ethereum, Litecoin. No fees, for ages 18+.
news.summary: Fidelity Investments has recently launched a crypto-centered retirement account, enabling investors to include digital assets in tax-advantaged portfolios directly. The account presents access to Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), and Litecoin (LTC), catering to individuals in the U.S. who are at least 18 years old. Assets acquired via this offering are securely stored in cold wallets under Fidelity's oversight. Investors have the flexibility to select from traditional IRAs, Roth IRAs, or rollover choices, all devoid of fees. The detailed story can be found on a financial news website.

news.headline: S&P predicts US growth to slow in 2025 to 1.9%, easing recession fears. Factors cited: weaker income, tariff effects.
news.summary: S&P Global predicts a slowdown in the U.S. economy in 2025 and 2026, with GDP growth expected to fall to 1.9% from the rebound pace of 2.9% in 2023 and 2.8% in 2024. Inflation remains high due to ongoing tariff effects, but a recession is not the central scenario, providing relief to investors. The slowdown is attributed to weaker household income, receding fiscal support, higher interest rates, and rising tariffs affecting growth momentum. S&P Global warns of upcoming policy moves that could further hinder growth.

news.headline: Gunvor has acquired a 42% stake in US shale gas producer Flywheel Energy, according to reports.
OWC launches SoftRAID 8.5 for macOS and Windows for enhanced reliability and performance.
news.summary: In Woodstock, Illinois, Other World Computing (OWC) unveiled the launch of OWC SoftRAID 8.5, their updated RAID management software for macOS and Windows. OWC, known for their high-performance storage solutions, memory, connectivity, software, and accessories, caters to creative and business professionals. This new release is jam-packed with numerous improvements, promising enhanced reliability and streamlined workflows. OWC SoftRAID 8.5 brings about significant enhancements, promising better performance for users on both macOS and Windows platforms.

news.headline: Beyond Oil starts India distribution; 6T order, first payment received under new agreement.
news.summary: Beyond Oil has recently started its first order under a new distribution deal targeted at the Indian markets. The company has received complete payment for an upcoming shipment of 6 tons.
